---
toc: false
listing:
  - id: publications
    contents: publications/*.qmd
    template: ejs/article.ejs
    categories: false
    sort-ui: [title,author,journal,year]
    filter-ui: [title,author,journal,year]
    page-size: 10
    field-display-names: 
      journal: "Journal"
      year: "Year"
page-layout: full
---

:::{#publications}
:::
